tagline: Home-based water and mold restoration franchise generating insurance-driven project revenue in a recession-resistant essential services market
description_short: All Dry Services is a home-based restoration franchise specializing in water damage mitigation and mold remediation. The manage-the-manager model supports executive or semi-absentee ownership with insurance carrier relationships providing lead flow from day one. Investment starts at $155,594 with no physical location required.
market_intelligence_insight: Disaster restoration market projected at $45.2B in 2026 growing at 5.28% CAGR through 2031; 27 billion-dollar weather events in 2024 generated $182.7B in losses sustaining strong demand; water damage leads with 38.56% of service revenue
item_19_headline: 2024 average gross revenue of $509,806 across 83 outlets; top third averaged $916,159
ongoing_support: dedicated Success Coach, monthly success calls, annual conference, field support, franchise advisory council, 24/7 operational support, marketing and lead generation
